endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.SqlVirtualMachine/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available SQL Rest API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.SqlVirtualMachine/sqlVirtualMachineGroups
endpoints.description: Gets all SQL virtual machine groups in a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.SqlVirtualMachine/sqlVirtualMachines
endpoints.description: Gets all SQL virtual machines in a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.SqlVirtualMachine/sqlVirtualMachineGroups

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.SqlVirtualMachine/sqlVirtualMachineGroups/{sqlVirtualMachineGroupName}
